do: Always include a DialogTitle (visible or visually-hidden) — it feeds aria-labelledby.
Compose DialogHeader / DialogFooter for the standard layout; control the close affordance with showCloseButton on DialogContent.
dont: Don't use Dialog for destructive or interrupting confirmations — use alert-dialog.
Don't nest a second Dialog inside an open one.

whenToUseInstead.when: destructive / irreversible confirmations that must interrupt
light content anchored to a trigger
